name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionFormatAttributes
summary: The DimensionFormatAttributes class controls the precision, format and unit of the dimension.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionFormatAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new dimension format attributes instance. By default the format rounds the dimension value to the nearest whole and shows it with no decimals. The unit is selected automatically.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionFormatAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new dimension format attributes instance with the given parameters.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: Unit
properties.summary: Gets or sets the unit of the dimension. Changing this attribute does not have any effect if the dimension measures an angle.

properties.name: UseDigitGrouping
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether digit grouping should be used or not.
